conditions: The account is the AWS Organizations management account.
decision_context: Use when assigning workload or shared-service ownership.
exclusions: Resources required for management-account-only tasks remain necessary.

source_references.locator: Use the management account only for tasks that require the management account; Avoid deploying workloads to the organization's management account
source_references.supported_proposition: Management-account privilege and SCP exemption support excluding workloads.

statement: AWS recommends keeping business workloads and their resources out of the Organizations management account because that account performs privileged organization tasks and its users and roles are not restricted by SCPs.
